author: @rocker-barrel4786
text: Just purchased the polluno escute updated bike for 2022. Its in the post to me. Its a step through version.

author: @glasserallen
text: You buy an electric bike and test it by, constantly manually pedaling I don't get it???????????? Kind of defeats the purpose of having an electric powered bike!

author: @peterharris3096
text: There are a ton of videos on this bike some more technical than others, this was fun and properly represents the kind of conditions and terrain I would ride in. I don,t think I would load in the back of my car to journey to a trail centre, Maybe but it weighs 25 kg not good for my back. Use a rear rack for a off road commute.

author: @ofm1nice456
text: Please can I get this bike I am 1.85cm in height and weigh 195kg 6'5?

author: @recumbentrocks2929
text: Your saddle is way too low Luke. Fine for off-roading though just up a few inches for on the tarmac.

author: @zoranpocrnja2646
text: Get yourself at least 1000w engine one!!

replies.author: @MyNameIsLukey
replies.text: ohhhh I would love to for sure! But here in the UK, the legal limit is a 250w motor restricted at 15mph. unless you want to take them on to private land. :(

replies.author: @zoranpocrnja2646
replies.text: I bought my one with adjustable speed  settings and I respecting the speed  rules,so when I need to go uphills I really need power all the times I using throttle mode gave s me same leg exercises without hurting my back pelvis areas;;!

author: @YoureNowOnTV
text:
Looks like an interesting product for commuting on hard packed or smooth trails. 

I deliver mail here in Australia on a 250w eBike without suspension that weighs 55 kilos before I load it up with 15+ kilos of mail and it's lots of fun!

Thanks for taking it out for a spin Luke and thanks Dave for helping Luke out with the camera work. 😀👍

replies.author: @MyNameIsLukey
replies.text:
Yes the bike performed really well, and it was an absolute blast to record!
But that does sound like fun! And that is one heavy bike lol. 
How does it handle on a full load of mail? 
Thank you mate! :)

replies.author: @YoureNowOnTV
replies.text: @MyNameIsLukey It can be a bit of a challenge not to knock people over in the city area or keep it on the centre stand when it's windy, but otherwise it's a hoot! Being paid to ride legally on the footpath and such is awesome 😀👍 Ps. Have you looked into setting up your phone to do the "Second cam" thing for Twitch yet? Apparently it's easy using the Twitch app. Cheers. 😀 🎥

author: @intelligenttinkering
text: Luke you should have gone flat out through that puddle and make some waves lol 😆 😂 🤣

replies.author: @MyNameIsLukey
replies.text: Hahaha next time I will for sure LOL. Thanks mate! :)|

author: @MG-cp8xk
text: I think the seat is a tad low. Fun video . How about a video on cleaning the bike.

author: @barbufodor1186
text: looks like you are having fun

replies.author: @MyNameIsLukey
replies.text: Hahahah yes it was a fun day to record for sure! :)

author: @mikes0121
text: This bike is exactly exactly the same the macwheel what I have its clear to me now this is just a slap on sticker type bike if it ever brakes you can't get the parts unless its 3rd party ones... only good thing is the restriction is easy to take off to go 22mph

replies.author: @soft16stick70
replies.text: I would love to know how to take the restriction off ... 15.5mph just isn't adequate... Could you explain how please

replies.author: @mikes0121
replies.text: @soft16stick70 what is your email I will take video for you and photo for preference

replies.author: @mikes0121
replies.text: There is 2 ways you can do it the harder option is unscrew the controller box and un plug the speed limit wire. Second option change setting in the screen display so your wheel size is smaller tricking the bike to go faster

replies.author: @soft16stick70
replies.text: @mikes0121 hi I have subscribed to your channel so if you did put a video up on how to un plug the speed wire I can see it ..will also try to trick of saying I have a different wheel size on the handlebar screen in the menu 🤞🤞

replies.author: @mikes0121
replies.text: @soft16stick70 I not opening up my bike again buddy I can send you some photos via email to help you tho
